title: [BUG] Formatting or aligning a cell within an `eachCell()` loop changes all cells in the worksheet
author: tomcatmwi

comments.author: reactuz
comments.body:
+1

Possibly the same issue has been around for more than a year, like [this](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2136)

comments.author: reactuz
comments.body: @Siemienik Can you please have a look at this?
